drivers.name: dbutil_2_3.sys
drivers.description: Dell DBUtil driver — allows arbitrary kernel memory R/W. Used by LockBit ransomware to kill AV/EDR.

drivers.name: mhyprot2.sys
drivers.description: Anti-cheat driver that allows arbitrary kernel memory ops. Used to terminate EDR processes at kernel level.

drivers.name: gdrv.sys
drivers.description: GIGABYTE driver with MmMapIoSpace vulnerability. Allows user-mode to kernel memory mapping.

drivers.name: aswarpot.sys
drivers.description: Avast Anti-Rootkit driver. Exploited to escalate privileges and kill security processes.

drivers.name: truesight.sys
drivers.description: RealTek audio driver exploited for BYOVD-based EDR termination.

drivers.name: iqvw64e.sys
drivers.description: Intel Network Adapter driver. Arbitrary kernel code execution via IOCTLs.

drivers.name: rtcore64.sys
drivers.description: MSI Afterburner driver. Allows kernel R/W via exposed IOCTLs — widely abused by ransomware.

drivers.name: winring0x64.sys
drivers.description: Open-source hardware utility driver. Direct kernel memory access, widely abused.

drivers.name: procexp152.sys
drivers.description: Process Explorer driver abused for cross-process handle manipulation and AV termination.

drivers.name: physmem.sys
drivers.description: Physical memory access driver. Maps arbitrary physical memory into user space.

drivers.name: speedfan.sys
drivers.description: Hardware monitoring driver with raw memory R/W. Used in kernel credential dumping attacks.

drivers.name: kprocesshacker.sys
drivers.description: Process Hacker kernel driver. Provides process termination at kernel level — EDR-killer potential.

drivers.name: ntiolib.sys
drivers.description: Hardware utility driver exposed to user-mode. IOCTL abuse for kernel-level persistence.

drivers.name: BS_RCIO64.sys
drivers.description: BIOSTAR overclocking driver. Ring-0 memory access via IOCTLs.

drivers.name: atillk64.sys
drivers.description: AMD ATI low-level kernel driver. Direct hardware register access abused for memory corruption.
